subcodes.first_line: O true friends! The gathering arranged by his excellency Khan was an assembly wherein the vision of the Most Exalted One was manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی جناب خان محفلی که آراستند محضری بود که تصویر ملا بالا بود
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @high station of the true believer
